---
title: "Hello!"
---

Hi there! Welcome to my teaching and training website. This is a repository for all the [teaching and training materials](courses.qmd) that I am currently using or have previously delivered.

My background is in Biomedical Engineering, and my [research interests](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=BvIDsDMAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) include:

-   Cardiovascular Mechanobiology and Tissue Engineering

-   Data Science Education in Low-Resource Settings

-   Accessible Data Visualization

I am also a [Certified Carpentries Instructor](https://carpentries.org/community/instructors/) and a trainer with the [Digital Research Academy](https://digital-research.academy/trainers/). In these roles my goal is to train learners on the basics of computational thinking. Additionally, I am an ardent promoter of using open-source tools (such as R/Python) to solve data analysis and visualization problems.
